name: Be a "Harem" Master Player
description:
uhhhhh... this took really long to make. So PLEASE let me know if you encounter any bugs or questionable things. Will try my best to fix them!!!

Basically you got teleported inside a game. The game is about summoning characters like typical gacha games. Then you have to assign them to missions to earn coins. Most of it gets explained in the initial message. I did my best to test the bot and stuff(mostly with proxy), so I have no idea how the quality is on JanitorLLM. I might add more things to the game in the future but for now only fixing if you encounter any errors (would be great if you tell me about any errors!!!!!). Have fun and enjoy the bot!!!

Also request for bots are always open so let me know and recommend me some things I could add/change.

BEFORE YOU BEGIN I BEG YOU TO PASTE THIS IN YOUR CHARACTER MEMORY:
Every character in {{user}}'s team:
[List every character you summon here. A list of details is provided as soon as you summon them you just have to manually add "Level: 1" and "Equipped Items/Weapons 0/5:" then add health points, levels and items as soon as the character receives it.]
I would also recommend to write your current coin balance in the memory and update it. Same with base-level.


Current Content:

  • Gacha System: For 5 coins you are able to summon a character. There are 3 rarities: 1. Standard 2. Unique 3. Great One. Standard is the most common while Great One is the rarest (this should be at least the case). Standard have a 90 out of 100 chance. Unique 9 out of 100. Great One 1/100. Characters should (hopefully) be able to be from various fictional verses as well as original characters.

  • Characters: There are male and female characters (maybe I should include non binary and stuff like that too, you tell me). Each character possesses a range of combat abilities and harem abilities. Well Standard characters do not have harem abilities. These abilities can be used in battle. Every character has health points which can increase with leveling up. Sometimes characters unlock new skills too when their level increases. You are able to "sacrifice" a character for coins and levels (this kills them).

  • Base Building: Yes, you are able to customize and build your own base. You start out on an empty baseplate and gradually can build new structures and other stuff with coins. A better base can protect from raids and make your characters enjoy their life more. Every 10 structures your base-level increases. At Base-Level 10 you unlock the Open World.

  • Coins: Coins can be earned trough missions, the open world and other stuff. They are the basic currency and are used for base building and gacha.

  • Missions: Missions will be your early game. There are several mission. Each mission has a different rank. Which are: E-Rank, D-Rank, C-Rank, B-Rank, A-Rank, S-Rank, SS-Rank and SSS-Rank. Mission give different types of rewards including coins and items/weapons.

  • Player Encounter: You are not the only player who plays this game. There are others. These players can raid you, trade with you or create alliances with you. There are three kinds of leaderboards: Raid Leaderboard (shows players with most raids), Character Leaderboard (shows players with character with the highest level) and Base Leaderboard (shows players with the highest base-level.)

  • Open World: The open world which you unlock at base-level 10 is infinite. There are a massive amount of bosses, questlines and regions you can meet and explore. You may encounter other players in the open world. The world is randomly produced for everyone of you, so do not expect it to be structured and have real worldbuilding (this might come in a later update if I find the motivation.)


    TRY
creator: AAAAsssssssddddd
